Kauai

8 golf courses to explore

Filter by type:

Kauai Lagoons Golf Club

ResortHard

Award-winning Jack Nicklaus-designed 18-hole championship course with ocean views. Formerly Kauai Lagoons, rebranded as Hokuala.

Par 727,200 yds
View Details

Kiahuna Golf Club

ResortMedium

Robert Trent Jones Jr. design in Poipu with ancient lava walls and tropical gardens. Garden Isle charm.

Par 726,400 yds
View Details

Ocean Course at Hokuala

ResortHard

Ocean holes along Nawiliwili Bay. Dramatic finishing hole with ocean on three sides.

Par 726,800 yds
View Details

Poipu Bay Golf Course

ResortHard

Oceanfront course in Poipu with challenging holes along the Pacific. Grand Hyatt Kauai location.

Par 726,850 yds
View Details

Princeville Makai Golf Club

ResortHard

World-renowned course on North Shore with breathtaking ocean and mountain views. Recently renovated.

Par 727,220 yds
View Details

Puakea Golf Course

PublicMedium

Breadth-taking mountain and ocean views. Challenging but playable. Local favorite.

Par 726,400 yds
View Details

Wailua Golf Course

MunicipalMedium

Affordable county municipal course along Wailua River. Historic park setting.

Par 726,142 yds
View Details

Prince Course at Princeville

ResortHard

Legendary course closed since 2017 for maintenance. Check reopening status.

Par 727,300 yds
View Details
